channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: NBA star Jimmy Butler to remain sidelined due to illness, according to Heat
item.description: Jimmy Butler has become synonymous with Heat basketball over his six seasons in Miami, but an illness has kept the star off the court several days.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Browns restructure QB Deshaun Watson's contract to create cap space, flexibility, AP source says
item.description: BEREA, Ohio (AP) — The Cleveland Browns have again restructured quarterback Deshaun Watson's massive contract to create salary-cap space and give them future flexibility, a person familiar with the move told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles' Jalen Hurts still in concussion protocol, likely out vs Cowboys
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles head coach Nick Sirianni said it's going be "tough" for quarterback Jalen Hurts to play against the Dallas Cowboys, given where he is in the concussion protocol.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Woolen's late interception seals win as Seahawks beat struggling Bears 6-3 to boost playoff hopes
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Seattle Seahawks made just enough plays to boost their fading playoff hopes by beating the struggling Chicago Bears on Thursday night. Now, they'll be rooting for the Arizona Cardinals to beat the Los Angeles Rams this weekend.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Beyoncé's performance highlighted Netflix's NFL debut on Christmas Day
item.description: Beyoncé provided more excitement than either game during Netflix’s NFL debut on Christmas Day. Riding into her halftime appearance on a white horse, the 32-time Grammy winner rocked her hometown Houston crowd with a nearly 13-minute performance on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears to host Inspire Change Game at final home game of the 2024 season
item.description: The NFL's Inspire Change initiative is hosting a game at Soldier Field to raise awareness for social justice causes, featuring players wearing "Inspire Change" gear, special edition merchandise, and in-stadium activations.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Breaking: Dave Fleming leaves CMU after 20 years
item.description: "I thank Coach Fleming for all his dedication and hard work at CMU," Colorado Mesa Athletic Director Joan McDermott said in a press release. "He is not only a great coach, but a special person and will be greatly missed.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Kiser, KREX 5

item.title: Tiger's son makes the ace. Bernhard Langer makes the winning putt in playoff over Woods at PNC
item.description: Tiger Woods never had so much fun losing in a playoff. For the 67-year-old Bernhard Langer, it never gets old winning the PNC Championship with his son.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tatum scores a season-high 43 to go with 16 rebounds, 10 assist in Celtics 123-98 win over Bulls
item.description: Jayson Tatum scored a season-high 43 points, grabbed 16 rebounds and dished out 10 assists for his third career triple-double and the Boston Celtics beat the Chicago Bulls 123-98 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Former San Diego Padres player Rickey Henderson dies at 65: reports
item.description: Rickey Henderson, the man who changed Major League Baseball with his blazing, unbeatable speed, has died, according to multiple reports.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, Fox 5

item.title: NBA fines Celtics coach Joe Mazzulla $35,000 for postgame comments toward officials
item.description: The NBA fined the Boston Celtics coach $35,000 on Saturday “for aggressively pursuing and directing inappropriate language toward a game official” at the end of his team's loss to the Chicago Bulls on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5
